column1: # Round-6 residual families (8 files, strict subset of the round-5 71).
# Classified from the round-5 full-corpus gate (wf_gate_round5.tsv, open side).
# diffcount = number of differing lines vs the HS reference wf-block.
# family key:
#   pubcap   — a "Public constants with mismatching capitalization" topic the
#              reference emits and the sealed checker omits entirely.
#   listfmt  — long numbered fact lists: reference right-aligns the index to
#              the widest entry ("   1." … "  10.") and separates consecutive
#              entries with a blank line; sealed uses fixed 2-space, no blanks.
#   lemanno  — a "Lemma annotations" block the reference emits, sealed omits.
#   blank1   — exactly one missing blank line between topics.
#   sortbody — body text of the "mismatching sorts" report diverges.
# A file can be in several families; primary listed first.
# relpath
